[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Kett''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who served in the [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He had previously been a merchant and a member of the [[Trade Defense Force]]. In [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], he was stationed aboard the [[Captor-class heavy munitions cruiser]] ''[[Admiral Korvin]]'' on a [[Second Battle of Zonama Sekot|mission]] to the living planet [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]] as apart of a Republic task force under the command of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] and [[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]].<ref name="RP">''[[Rogue Planet]]''</ref>
